binding_plan: Work State Store loads teacher scoped work_state.
Composer derives render_directive from work_state and active work_objects.
Preview renderer consumes render_directive without deciding business focus.
Teacher review gate state controls whether candidate patches can be applied in later stages.
rollback_plan: Keep current mock preview fixture available.
Disable store binding behind preview-only flag if sandbox store fails.
migration_risk: schema drift between mock render_directive and future store objects
cost gate incomplete may block provider-backed bulk flows
event log can become paperwork-like if not kept lightweight
